CellData.Data:
import torch
import torch.nn as nn

X = torch.tensor(df[["hours_studied", "sleep_hours"]].values, dtype=torch.float32)
y = torch.tensor(df["score"].values, dtype=torch.float32).view(-1, 1)

model = nn.Linear(2, 1)

criterion = nn.MSELoss()
optimizer = torch.optim.SGD(model.parameters(), lr=0.01)

# training loop
for epoch in range(10):
    # forward pass
    pred = model(X)  
    # cal diff b/w prediction and actual value
    loss = criterion(pred, y)
    # clear accumulated value
    optimizer.zero_grad()
    # backward pass
    loss.backward()
    # updating weights and bias ie model parameters
    optimizer.step()
    print(f"Epoch : {epoch+1} || Loss :{loss}")

print("training complete")
